It also shows that this Mercedes-AMG has been registered to one owner in California since new. - According to the build sheet provided in the gallery, notable factory equipment includes 22-inch AMG wheels, a panoramic sunroof, heated and ventilated multicontour front seats with massage, heated and power-adjustable second-row seats, and Distronic Plus adaptive cruise control. The selling dealer reports no notable modifications. - Mercedes released the X167 GLS for 2020 as the company’s largest and most luxurious SUV, retaining the “S-Class of SUVs” title. Bigger and more commanding than ever, the GLS is also praised for its impressive technology, wonderful interior, and potent electrified engines. - Power comes from a 4.0-liter twin-turbocharged V8 linked to a 48-volt mild-hybrid system, rated at 603 horsepower and 627 lb-ft of torque. Output is sent to all four wheels via a 9-speed automatic transmission.

item.title: 1999 BMW 323i Convertible
item.description: THIS... is a 1999 BMW 323i Convertible, finished in Titanium Silver Metallic with a black soft top and a light grey interior. - This BMW features the desirable 5-speed manual transmission, and the odometer currently displays approximately 60,500 miles. - The attached Carfax vehicle history report contains multiple reporting gaps, though it shows no accidents or mileage discrepancies during the given time period. It also shows that this BMW has been registered to two owners in California and Arizona since new. - According to the build sheet provided in the gallery, notable factory equipment includes 16-inch wheels, Montana leather upholstery, an M steering wheel, and dual-zone automatic climate control. Notable modifications reported by the seller are limited to an aftermarket shift knob. - The E36-generation 3 Series was produced from 1990 to 1999 and was notable for its balanced chassis and refined driving experience. The 323i Convertible offered open-air motoring paired with BMW’s reputation for handling, making it a popular choice among enthusiasts. As one of the last E36 convertibles, this model represents a blend of classic design and practical features from the era. - Power comes from a 2.5-liter inline-6, rated at 168 horsepower and 181 lb-ft of torque. Output is sent to the rear wheels via a 5-speed manual transmission.

item.title: 2019 Alfa Romeo Giulia Quadrifoglio NRING Edition
item.description: THIS... is a 2019 Alfa Romeo Giulia Quadrifoglio NRING Edition, finished in Circuito Gray Matte with a black and red interior. - The attached Carfax vehicle history report shows no mileage discrepancies in this Alfa’s past. It also shows that this Alfa has been registered in Texas and Florida since new. - According to the digital window sticker provided in the gallery, notable factory equipment includes the Quadrifoglio NRING Package, an active suspension system, a carbon fiber hood, and leather and Alcantara upholstery. The seller reports no notable modifications. - The Alfa Romeo Giulia Quadrifoglio — which means "four-leaf clover" in Italian — has been praised by automotive journalists and enthusiasts for its exotic styling and outstanding performance. It broke the Nürburgring's Nordschleife record for a production sedan with a time of 7 minutes 39 seconds and was named Motor Trend Car of the Year in 2018. - Power comes from a 2.9-liter twin-turbocharged V6, rated at 505 horsepower and 443 lb-ft of torque. Output is sent to the rear wheels via an 8-speed automatic transmission.

item.title: 2011 Ford Mustang GT Premium Convertible
item.description: THIS... is a 2011 Ford Mustang GT Premium Convertible, finished in Performance White with a black soft top and a Stone Turned interior. - The attached Carfax vehicle history report shows no accidents or mileage discrepancies in this Mustang's past. It also shows that it has been registered to one owner since new. - According to the window sticker provided in the gallery, notable factory equipment includes the Electronics Package, 18-inch wheels, the Comfort Package, a power-operated soft top, heated and power-adjustable front seats, a Shaker 500 audio system, and a rear video camera. - Notable modifications reported by the seller include a Roush Stage 3 supercharger kit, aftermarket intercooler, aftermarket fuel system, slotted rotors, and aftermarket exterior badges. - Called S197 internally, the fifth-generation Mustang launched for 2005 with a heritage-laced design, a new platform, and an available 24-valve V8 engine. Extending the wheelbase gave the Mustang a much more compliant ride than its predecessor, though it remained true to the pony car ethos that characterized the original model. Production ended in 2014. - Power comes from a 5.0-liter V8, rated at 412 horsepower and 390 lb-ft of torque in stock, naturally aspirated form. Due to the modifications performed to this Ford, the seller claims it now makes 675 horsepower, but a dyno sheet was not provided to confirm. Output is sent to the rear wheels via a 6-speed automatic transmission.

item.title: 2012 Volkswagen GTI
item.description: THIS... is a 2012 Volkswagen GTI, finished in Carbon Steel Gray Metallic with an Interlagos Plaid interior. - This GTI is equipped with the desirable 6-speed manual transmission. - The attached Carfax history report indicates no mileage discrepancies in this GTI's past. It also shows California ownership since new. - According to the build sheet provided in the gallery, notable factory equipment includes 18-inch Detroit wheels, a sunroof, sport suspension, and heated front seats. The selling dealer reports no notable modifications. - Volkswagen released the sixth-generation GTI for 2010 with a sharper-looking exterior design, an updated suspension system, and a nicer interior. Offered with two and four doors, the GTI used an evolution of its predecessor's proven turbocharged engine and continued to come standard with a 6-speed manual transmission, though an automatic was optional. Enthusiasts and journalists agreed the sixth-generation GTI stayed true to its roots: it was quick, nimble, and relatively affordable. - Power comes from a 2.0-liter turbocharged inline-4, rated at 200 horsepower and 207 lb-ft of torque. Output is sent to the front wheels via a 6-speed manual transmission.

item.title: 1971 Datsun 240Z
item.description: THIS... is a 1971 Datsun 240Z, finished in yellow with a black interior. - A partial list of notable currently installed equipment reported by the seller includes 15-inch Rota wheels, aftermarket headlights, vinyl upholstery, and a wood-rimmed steering wheel. - The 240Z spearheaded the line of Z cars that continues to this day when it made its debut in 1969. The coupe offered distinctive-looking fastback styling, a four-wheel independent suspension system, and a straight-6 engine. It built up a loyal fan base on the American market, and it became a force to reckon with on the international rallying scene. The 240Z notably took first and second place in the 1971 East African Safari Rally. Production ended in 1978. - Power comes from a 2.4-liter straight-6, rated at about 151 horsepower and 148 lb-ft of torque. Output is sent to the rear wheels via a 4-speed manual transmission.

item.title: 2020 BMW X5 M50i
item.description: THIS… is a 2020 BMW X5 M50i, finished in Black Sapphire Metallic with a black interior. - The attached Carfax vehicle history report shows no mileage discrepancies in this X5’s past. - According to the build sheet provided in the gallery, notable factory equipment includes 20-inch Style 740M wheels, M Sport brakes, M Sport differential, adaptive M suspension, a Sky Lounge panoramic sunroof, Icon Adaptive Laserlight headlights, Merino leather upholstery, power-adjustable heated front seats, and a Harman Kardon surround sound system. Notable modifications reported by the selling dealer are limited to window deflectors and black rear badges. - Called G05 internally, the fourth-generation X5 made its debut for 2019. It was slightly bigger in every direction than its predecessor and it followed the rest of the BMW range's shift toward a sharper-looking exterior design. The overhaul also brought more technology, including an updated infotainment system and an available rear-wheel steering system. - Power comes from a 4.4-liter twin-turbocharged V8, rated at 523 horsepower and 553 lb-ft of torque. Output is sent to all four wheels via an 8-speed automatic transmission and BMW's xDrive permanent all-wheel drive system.

item.title: 2000 Mercedes-Benz E320 Sedan
item.description: THIS... is a 2000 Mercedes-Benz E320 Sedan, finished in Brilliant Silver Metallic with a gray interior. - The odometer on this E320 currently displays approximately 55,100 miles. - The attached Carfax vehicle history report indicates no accidents or mileage discrepancies in this E320’s past - According to the build sheet provided in the gallery, notable factory equipment includes 16-inch wheels, a power sunroof, leather upholstery, heated front seats, and a Bose sound system. The selling dealer reports no notable modifications. - Mercedes-Benz introduced the W210-generation E-Class for the 1996 model year as a replacement for the W124. Offered as a sedan and a wagon, the model looked nothing like its predecessor thanks to a more rounded silhouette and oval headlights, and its new front suspension improved comfort without sacrificing handling. 1998 brought a new V6 engine with 2 spark plugs per cylinder. Production continued until the W211 E-Class was released for 2003. - Power comes from a M112 3.2-liter V6, rated at 221 horsepower and 232 lb-ft of torque. Output is sent to the rear wheels via a 5-speed automatic transmission.

item.title: 2019 Tesla Model X

The seller reports no notable modifications. - Tesla introduced the Model X in 2015 as its first SUV, featuring distinctive falcon wing doors and a focus on advanced technology. The Model X shares its platform with the Model S and is known for combining electric performance with family-friendly utility. Over the years, the Model X has received various hardware and software updates to enhance its capabilities and range. - Power comes from two electric motors that draw electricity from a 100-kilowatt-hour lithium-ion battery pack to power all four wheels with 532 horsepower and 713 lb-ft of torque, according to third-party estimates.

item.title: 2018 BMW M550i xDrive
item.description: THIS… is a 2018 BMW M550i xDrive, finished in Rhodonite Silver Metallic with an Ivory interior. - The attached Carfax vehicle history report shows no mileage discrepancies in this M550i’s past. - According to the build sheet provided in the gallery, notable factory equipment includes the Executive, Luxury Seating, and Cold Weather packages, 20-inch wheels, and a Bowers & Wilkins sound system. - Notable modifications reported by the seller include an ARM Motorsport air intake and charge pipes and a steering wheel cover. - Called G30 internally, BMW's seventh-generation 5 Series arrived for 2017 with a sharper exterior design, less weight than its predecessor, and an array of available tech features. The M550i model was positioned below the M5, featuring a twin-turbocharged V8 and suspension tweaks. - Power comes from a 4.4-liter twin-turbocharged V8, rated at 456 horsepower and 480 lb-ft of torque. Output is sent to all four wheels via an 8-speed automatic transmission and BMW's xDrive all-wheel drive system.

item.title: 1996 Mazda MX-5 Miata

Years in the making, it picked up where British and Italian roadsters left off by offering enthusiasts nimble handling and an open-air driving experience at a relatively affordable price. - Power comes from a 1.8-liter inline-4, rated at 133 horsepower and 114 lb-ft of torque. Output is sent to the rear wheels via a 5-speed manual transmission.

item.title: 2023 Dodge Challenger R/T Scat Pack
item.description: THIS... is a 2023 Dodge Challenger R/T Scat Pack, finished in Destroyer Gray with a black interior. - This Challenger features the desirable 6-speed manual transmission, and its odometer currently displays approximately 1,000 miles. - The attached Carfax history report lists no accidents or mileage discrepancies in this Challenger's past. It also shows that this Dodge has been registered in Arizona since new. - According to the window sticker provided in the gallery, this Challenger is an R/T Scat Pack model, and notable factory equipment includes the Plus Package, the Technology Group, the Harmon Kardon Audio Group, 20-inch Low Gloss Granite Crystal wheels, an active exhaust system, a "Last Call" underhood plaque, a performance suspension system, a Uconnect 4C NAV infotainment system with 8.4-inch display, and a rearview camera. The seller reports no notable modifications. - Dodge resurrected the emblematic Challenger nameplate for the 2008 model year after a 25-year hiatus. Designed and marketed as a true modern-day muscle car, the coupe stood out with retro-inspired styling and brawny engine options. It was also the first rear-wheel drive Challenger since the original model retired in 1974. - Power comes from a 6.4-liter V8, rated at about 485 horsepower and 475 lb-ft of torque. Output is sent to the rear wheels via a 6-speed manual transmission.

item.title: 2015 Fiat 500 Abarth
item.description: THIS... is a 2015 Fiat 500 Abarth, finished in Granito Lucente with a Nero and Rosso interior. - The attached Carfax vehicle history report indicates no mileage discrepancies in this Abarth’s past. - According to the window sticker provided in the gallery, notable factory equipment includes the Comfort/Convenience Group, 17-inch forged aluminum wheels, a power sunroof, and leather upholstery. Notable modifications reported by the seller are limited to a Sprint air filter. - Fiat returned to the American market after a decades-long hiatus when it introduced the 500 for 2012. The hot-rodded Abarth-tuned model offered numerous performance-oriented upgrades including a more powerful engine, a firmer suspension system, and bigger brakes. Production for the American market ended after the 2019 model year. - Power comes from a 1.4-liter turbocharged inline-4, rated at 160 horsepower and 170 lb-ft of torque. Output is sent to the front wheels via a 5-speed manual transmission.

item.title: 2006 Porsche 911 Carrera 4S Coupe
item.description: THIS... is a 2006 Porsche 911 Carrera 4S Coupe, finished in Arctic Silver Metallic with a Stone Grey and black interior. - This 911 features the desirable 6-speed manual transmission, and the odometer currently displays approximately 29,300 miles. - The attached Carfax history report indicates no accidents or mileage discrepancies in this 911's past. - According to the build sheet provided in the gallery, this 911 is a Carrera 4S model, and notable factory equipment includes the Sport Chrono Package Plus, Porsche Active Suspension Management, a sport exhaust system, and a Bose sound system. - Notable modifications reported by the seller include 19-inch HRE wheels, a V-Flow air intake, and a Pioneer touchscreen head unit. - Porsche released the 997-generation 911 for 2005 with a more powerful engine than the outgoing model, oval headlights, and a redesigned interior. Engineers made the front and rear tracks wider for better stability, and interior designers paid more attention to the build quality. The end result was a more refined 911 that nonetheless remained true to its roots. - Power comes from a 3.8-liter flat-6, rated at 355 horsepower and 295 lb-ft of torque. Output is sent to all four wheels via a 6-speed manual transmission.

item.title: 2004 Honda S2000
item.description: THIS... is a 2004 Honda S2000, finished in Silverstone Metallic with a black soft top and a red and black interior. - The attached Carfax history report shows no accidents or mileage discrepancies in this S2000's past. - A partial list of notable equipment reported by the seller includes 17-inch wheels, a limited-slip differential, a power-retractable soft top, leather upholstery, a digital instrument cluster, and air conditioning. Notable modifications reported by the seller are limited to wiring for an auxiliary audio cable. - The Honda S2000 is beloved for its driver-focused interior, taught handling, 50:50 weight distribution, and high-revving engine. The refreshed AP2 model was introduced in 2004 with changes to the exterior cosmetics, lighting, exhaust pipes, increased-diameter alloy wheels, a revised interior, and raising the F-Series motor's displacement from 2.0 to 2.2-liters. Production ended in 2009. - Power comes from an F22C 2.2-liter inline-4, rated at 240 horsepower and 162 lb-ft of torque. Output is sent to the rear wheels via a 6-speed manual transmission.

item.title: 2020 Mercedes-AMG GT63 S 4-Door
item.description: THIS... is a 2020 Mercedes-AMG GT63 S 4-Door, finished in Obsidian Black Metallic with a black interior. - The odometer on this GT63 currently displays approximately 23,700 miles. - The attached Carfax vehicle history report shows no mileage discrepancies in this GT63’s past. - According to the build sheet provided in the gallery, this GT63 4-Door is an S model, and notable factory equipment includes the Driver Assistance Package, 21-inch AMG forged cross-spoke wheels, AMG carbon ceramic brakes, Exclusive Nappa leather upholstery, heated and ventilated active multicontour front seats with massage, a Surround View camera, and a Burmester High-End 3D-surround sound system. - Notable modifications reported by the seller include a RENNtech ECU tune, RENNtech downpipes, a RENNtech Exhaust Valve Module, a RENNtech Digital Suspension Lowering Module, XPEL Stealth paint protection film, and a DarwinPRO carbon fiber body kit. - Mercedes-AMG had the Porsche Panamera in its crosshairs when it developed the GT 4-Door. Launched for 2019, the model stood out with a coupe-like fastback design that borrowed styling cues from the two-door GT and a large hatch that made it surprisingly practical. It was one of the few cars that AMG was allowed to design in-house; there is no "Mercedes-Benz"-branded version. - Power comes from a 4.0-liter twin-turbocharged V8, rated at 630 horsepower and 664 lb-ft of torque in stock form. Due to the modifications performed to this GT63, it may produce more power, but a dyno sheet was not provided to confirm. Output is sent to all four wheels via a 9-speed automatic transmission and an AMG Performance 4Matic+ all-wheel drive system.

item.title: 2003 Aston Martin Vanquish
item.description: THIS... is a 2003 Aston Martin Vanquish, finished in Tungsten Silver Metallic with a black interior. - YouTuber and Cars & Bids founder Doug DeMuro recently reviewed this Vanquish, and the video is viewable below. - The odometer on this Vanquish currently displays approximately 16,300 miles. - The attached Carfax history report lists no accidents or mileage discrepancies in this Vanquish's past. It also shows mostly California ownership since new. - A partial list of notable equipment reported by the seller includes 19-inch wheels, a 2+2 interior, leather upholstery, heated front seats, push-button ignition, and a Linn audio system. The seller reports no notable modifications. - The Vanquish was a step forward for the Aston Martin brand when it came out as its new flagship in the early 2000s. With an impressive V12 engine, then-cutting edge automated manual transmission, and truly sensational Ian Callum design, the Vanquish confirmed that Aston Martin could still produce a high-performance grand-touring luxury coupe that could give serious competition to the likes of Ferrari. - Power comes from a 5.9-liter V12, rated at 460 horsepower and 400 lb-ft of torque. Output is sent to the rear wheels via a 6-speed automated manual transmission.

item.title: 1988 Chevrolet Corvette Coupe 35th Anniversary Edition
item.description: THIS... is a 1988 Chevrolet Corvette Coupe 35th Anniversary Edition, finished in Anniversary White with a white interior, and offered by ThePhotographersGarage, a Cars & Bids Certified Seller. - The attached Carfax history report starts in 1991 and lists no accidents since. It also shows California ownership for the duration of the report. - A partial list of notable equipment reported by the seller includes the 35th Anniversary Special Edition Package, a limited-slip differential, transparent and solid removable roof panels, and a digital instrument cluster. The only notable modification reported by the seller is an Alpine head unit. - Introduced as a 1984 model, the C4 Corvette stood out from its predecessor with vastly improved performance and far more modern styling. It's widely considered the first modern Corvette, and it blazed the path the nameplate followed for decades to come. Production ended in 1996. - Power comes from a 5.7-liter V8, rated at 245 horsepower and 340 lb-ft of torque. Output is sent to the rear wheels via a 4-speed automatic transmission.

item.title: 1994 Audi RS2 Avant
item.description: THIS... is a 1994 Audi RS2 Avant, finished in Volcano Black Mica with a black interior. - This is a left-hand-drive, European-market wagon that's titled in New York. Reportedly imported from France in 2023, it's equipped with a metric instrument cluster and its odometer displays about 208,500 kilometers, which represents approximately 129,600 miles. - A partial list of notable equipment reported by the seller includes a locking rear differential, a sunroof, heated Recaro front seats, and carbon fiber interior trim. Notable modifications reported by the seller include a black finish on exterior badges and a JVC AM/FM/CD head unit. - Porsche helped Audi turn the humble 80 Avant into its first super-wagon. Launched in 1994, the RS2 Avant became the first Audi model to break the symbolic 250-kph (155-mph) barrier thanks largely to a 2.2-liter 5-cylinder engine fitted with a bigger turbocharger and a bigger intercooler, among other modifications. Porsche also made changes to the braking and suspension systems. The RS2 Avant was far more popular than expected; 2,891 units were built until 1996, and it spawned a line of hot-rodded, RS-badged Audi wagons that continues today. The model was never officially sold in the United States. - Power comes from a 2.2-liter turbocharged 5-cylinder engine, rated at 311 horsepower and 302 lb-ft of torque. Output is sent to the four wheels via a 6-speed manual transmission.

item.title: 2001 Dodge Viper RT/10
item.description: THIS... is a 2001 Dodge Viper RT/10, finished in Viper Race Yellow with a black and yellow interior. - This Viper is equipped with a 6-speed manual transmission. - The attached Carfax history report lists no accidents or mileage discrepancies in this Viper's past. It also shows registration to one owner in California since 2003. - A partial list of notable equipment reported by the seller includes 18-inch polished aluminum wheels, a limited-slip differential, power-adjustable pedals, and air conditioning. - Notable modifications reported by the seller include a straight-pipe exhaust system, custom black and yellow interior upholstery, and chrome door sill plates and climate switches. - Introduced for 1996, and internally coded SR II, the second-generation Viper weighed around 60 pounds less than its predecessor, thanks in part to widespread use of aluminum, and a switch from side- to rear-mounted exhaust exits was also notable. Production ended in 2002. - Power comes from an 8.0-liter V10, rated at 450 horsepower and 490 lb-ft of torque. Output is sent to the rear wheels via a 6-speed manual transmission.

item.title: 2010 Lexus LX 570
item.description: THIS... is a 2010 Lexus LX 570, finished in Mercury Metallic with a Cashmere interior, and offered by Auto_Alchemy_Florida, a Cars & Bids Certified Seller. - The attached Carfax vehicle history report shows no mileage discrepancies in this LX 570’s past. It also shows that this Lexus has been registered to one owner mostly in Texas since new. - A partial list of notable equipment reported by the selling dealer includes an Adaptive Variable Suspension system, a locking center differential, heated and ventilated front seats, power-folding third-row seats, and a Mark Levinson sound system. The selling dealer reports no notable modifications. - Released for 2008, the LX 570 was a more luxurious evolution of the 200-Series Land Cruiser. Stylists dialed in a greater degree of visual differentiation between the Lexus and the Toyota models, and the LX continued to offer a much longer list of features and a more luxurious interior than the Land Cruiser. V8 power, full-time four-wheel drive, and body-on-frame construction made it exceptionally capable off the beaten path. Lexus gave the LX 570 several updates inside and out before ending production in 2021. - Power comes from a 5.7-liter V8, rated at 383 horsepower and 403 lb-ft of torque. Output is sent to the four wheels via a 6-speed automatic transmission and a 2-speed transfer case.

item.title: 2005 Chrysler Crossfire Limited Roadster

Highlights include 18-inch front and 19-inch rear aftermarket wheels, Magnaflow cat-back exhaust, and a Panasonic head unit. - The Chrysler Crossfire was introduced for the 2004 model year and was jointly developed by Chrysler and Mercedes-Benz, sharing its platform with the first-generation Mercedes-Benz SLK. The Roadster variant provided an open-air driving experience while retaining the coupe's distinctive styling elements. The Crossfire is noted by enthusiasts for its blend of German engineering and American design cues. - Power comes from a 3.2-liter V6, rated at 215 horsepower and 229 lb-ft of torque. Output is sent to the rear wheels via a 6-speed manual transmission.

item.title: 2013 Ford Mustang Boss 302 Laguna Seca Edition
item.description: THIS… is a 2013 Ford Mustang Boss 302 Laguna Seca Edition, finished in School Bus Yellow with a Charcoal Black interior. - This Mustang is equipped with a 6-speed manual transmission, and the odometer currently displays approximately 9,600 miles. - The attached Carfax vehicle history report contains a reporting gap from 2016 to 2021, though it shows no accidents or mileage discrepancies during the given time period. - According to the digital window sticker provided in the gallery, notable factory equipment includes Equipment Group 501A, 19-inch wheels, a Torsen rear differential, adjustable suspension, and Recaro front seats. - Notable modifications reported by the seller include an AIRAID carbon fiber air intake, a Ford Racing oil filler cap, and a Canton aluminum radiator tank. - Ford resurrected the Boss 302 nameplate on a limited-edition Mustang released for the 2012 model year. It received a more powerful V8, numerous suspension upgrades, 19-inch wheels, and an aero package similar to the one Ford installed on its race cars. Ford reportedly produced 765 Laguna Seca Edition Mustangs for the 2013 model year; this is #574, according to a plaque in the engine bay. - Power comes from a 5.0-liter V8 engine, rated at 444 horsepower and 380 lb-ft of torque. Output is sent to the rear wheels via a 6-speed manual transmission.

item.title: 2006 Audi A4 3.2 Quattro Sedan
item.description: THIS… is a 2006 Audi A4 3.2 Quattro Sedan, finished in Light Silver Metallic with an Ebony interior, and offered by TheShopClubs, a Cars & Bids Certified Seller. - This Audi features the desirable 6-speed manual transmission, and its odometer currently shows about 67,300 miles. - The attached Carfax vehicle history report shows no mileage discrepancies in this Audi’s past. - According to the window sticker provided in the gallery, notable factory equipment includes the S-Line, Technology, Premium, Audio, and Cold Weather packages. The selling dealer reports no notable modifications. - Called B7 internally, the third-generation A4 made its debut for the 2005 model year as a comprehensive evolution of its predecessor. Audi played it safe in the design department, and this approach allowed it to lure a growing number of buyers away from the competition. - Power comes from a 3.2-liter V6, rated at 255 horsepower and 243 lb-ft of torque. Output is sent to all four wheels via a 6-speed manual transmission and Audi's Quattro permanent all-wheel drive system.

item.title: 1999 Toyota Tacoma Regular Cab
item.description: THIS… is a 1999 Toyota Tacoma Regular Cab, finished in Cardinal Red with an Oak interior. - This Tacoma features the desirable 5-speed manual transmission, and the odometer currently displays approximately 41,900 miles. - The attached Carfax vehicle history report contains multiple reporting gaps, though it shows no accidents or mileage discrepancies during the given time period. - According to the window sticker provided in the gallery, notable factory equipment includes the Value Package Plus, 14-inch steel wheels, a locking fuel door, cloth upholstery, and a front bench seat. - Notable modifications reported by the seller are limited to an aftermarket shift knob and a Dual aftermarket head unit with a removable display. - Toyota split its global pickup range into two model lines when it released the original Tacoma in 1995. Developed for and built in America, it was a more leisure-oriented model than the work-focused Hilux that soldiered on overseas. The line-up included 2- and 4-wheel-drive models plus a regular or an extended cab. Production ended in 2005. - Power comes from a 2RZ-FE 2.4-liter inline-4, rated at about 142 horsepower and 160 lb-ft of torque. Output is sent to the rear wheels via a 5-speed manual transmission.

item.title: 2015 BMW 435i xDrive Coupe
item.description: THIS… is a 2015 BMW 435i xDrive Coupe, finished in Imperial Blue Metallic with a Venetian Beige interior. - This 435i features the desirable 6-speed manual transmission. - The attached Carfax vehicle history report shows no accidents or mileage discrepancies in this BMW’s past. It also confirms that this is a one-owner car. - According to the window sticker provided in the gallery, notable factory equipment includes the Premium Package, 18-inch wheels, a sunroof, Dakota leather upholstery, and heated front seats. The seller reports no notable modifications. - Introduced for the 2014 model year, the F32-generation 4 Series is the successor to the E92 3 Series coupe. Perfect for enthusiasts and daily drivers alike, the 435i Coupe combines sporty agility with everyday practicality, making it a standout choice in the luxury sport coupe segment. - Power comes from an N55 3.0-liter turbocharged inline-6, rated at 300 horsepower and 300 lb-ft of torque. Output is sent to all four wheels via a 6-speed manual transmission and BMW's xDrive permanent all-wheel drive system.

item.title: 2013 Range Rover Sport HSE
item.description: THIS… is a 2013 Range Rover Sport HSE, finished in Fuji White with an Almond interior, and offered by longimotorsports, a Cars & Bids Certified Seller. - The attached Carfax vehicle history report indicates no mileage discrepancies in this Range Rover Sport’s past. It shows California ownership since new. - According to the build sheet provided in the gallery, this Range Rover Sport is an HSE model, and notable factory equipment includes 19-inch wheels, electronic air suspension, a sunroof, leather upholstery, heated front and rear seats, and a Harman/Kardon sound system. The selling dealer reports no notable modifications. - Introduced for the 2006 model year in the U.S., the Range Rover Sport represented a departure from Land Rover's usual off-road-focused offerings. The performance-oriented Sport model is based on the Discovery LR3 chassis, though it's been shortened by 5.5 inches and weighs about 450 lbs less. 2010 brought a facelift that included a new-look exterior design and interior improvements, while a second update released in 2012 brought a power-operated hatch and an updated media interface. - Power comes from a 5.0-liter V8, rated at 375 horsepower and 375 lb-ft of torque. Output is sent to all four wheels via a 6-speed automatic transmission and a 2-speed transfer case.

item.title: 2013 Porsche Boxster
item.description: THIS... is a 2013 Porsche Boxster, finished in Guards Red with a black soft top and a black interior. - This Boxster features the desirable 6-speed manual transmission. - The attached Carfax vehicle history report indicates no mileage discrepancies in this Porsche’s past. - According to the build sheet provided in the gallery, notable factory equipment includes the Premium and Infotainment packages, and heated and ventilated seats. The seller reports no notable modifications. - Porsche introduced the third-generation Boxster for the 2013 model year. Called 981 internally, it was slightly longer and wider than its predecessor, it offered a lower center of gravity for better handling, and it received a sharper-looking exterior design. Porsche relied on aluminum components to make the 981 lighter than its predecessor, so the roadster remained nimble to drive in spite of its bigger footprint. - Power comes from a 2.7-liter flat-6, rated at 265 horsepower and 206 lb-ft of torque. Output is sent to the rear wheels via a 6-speed manual transmission.

item.title: 2002 Jaguar XJ8
item.description: THIS... is a 2002 Jaguar XJ8, finished in Sapphire Metallic with an Ivory interior. - This Jaguar’s factory-fitted 4.0-Liter V8 has been swapped with a 5.7-Liter LS1 V8 from a 2004 Chevrolet Corvette. Additionally, this XJ8 carries a California Bureau of Automotive Repair (BAR) label, indicating it has been inspected and verified as emissions-compliant in the state of California. - The attached Carfax vehicle history report shows no accidents in this XJ8’s past. - A partial list of notable equipment reported by the seller includes a chrome "Leaper" hood ornament, leather upholstery, power-adjustable front seats, wood interior trim, a leather-wrapped steering wheel, automatic climate control, and rear parking sensors. - Notable modifications reported by the seller are extensive, and the full list is detailed below. Highlights include a Corvette-sourced 5.7-liter LS1 V8 engine, a 4L60 4-speed automatic transmission, a Walbro 255 LPH fuel pump, 19-inch Aodhan wheels, Jaguar XJR brakes, Jaguar XJR suspension, and custom widebody kit. - Jaguar introduced the "X308"-generation XJ for the 1998 model year. It was the third and final evolution of the XJ40 platform, which had been in production since 1986. A V8 engine was also introduced, replacing the straight-6 AJ6 engine. Production ended in December 2002. - Power comes from a 5.7-liter LS1 V8 engine, rated at 350 horsepower and 375 lb-ft of torque when stock. Due to the modifications performed to this XJ8, it may produce more power, but a dyno sheet was not provided to confirm. Output is sent to the rear wheels via a 4-speed automatic transmission.

item.title: 2014 BMW 328d xDrive Sports Wagon
item.description: THIS... is a 2014 BMW 328d xDrive Sports Wagon, finished in Glacier Silver Metallic with a black interior, and offered by Auto_Alchemy_Florida, a Cars & Bids Certified Seller. - The attached Carfax vehicle history report indicates no mileage discrepancies in this 328d’s past. - According to the build sheet provided in the gallery, notable factory equipment includes the Sport Line Package, a panoramic sunroof, Dakota leather upholstery, and a navigation system. The selling dealer reports no notable modifications. - BMW launched the sixth-generation 3 Series for 2012. It was called F30 internally, and the station wagon variant released later was known as the F31. Both models were slightly bigger than their respective predecessors and offered buyers a much more up-to-date interior. Production ended in 2019. While the sedan returned for a seventh generation, BMW hasn't sold another 3 Series wagon in the United States. - Power comes from a 2.0-liter turbodiesel inline-4, rated at 180 horsepower and 280 lb-ft of torque. Output is sent to all four wheels via an 8-speed automatic transmission.

item.title: 2022 Porsche Taycan
item.description: THIS... is a 2022 Porsche Taycan, finished in black with a black and Limestone Beige interior. - The attached Carfax history report indicates no accidents or mileage discrepancies in this Taycan's past. It also shows registration in California and Texas since new. - According to the Monroney Label provided in the gallery, notable factory equipment includes the Premium Package, 19-inch Taycan S Aero wheels, PASM, leather upholstery, and Porsche Electric Sport Sound. The seller reports no notable modifications. - Launched in 2020, the Taycan stands out as the first series-produced electric car in the Porsche range. It illustrates a different approach to EV design with an 800-volt electrical architecture that allows for faster charging and a 2-speed automatic transmission for quick starts and a higher top speed. - Power comes from a single electric motor, rated at up to 402 horsepower and 254 lb-ft of torque. Linked to a 79.2-kilowatt-hour lithium-ion battery pack, the motor spins the rear wheels via a 2-speed automatic transmission. It offers an EPA-rated 208 miles of driving range.

item.title: 2015 Ford Mustang GT Premium Coupe
item.description: THIS... is a 2015 Ford Mustang GT Premium Coupe, finished in Race Red with a Ceramic interior. - This Mustang features the desirable 6-speed manual transmission. - The attached Carfax history report lists no accidents or mileage discrepancies in this Mustang's past. - According to the window sticker provided in the gallery, this Mustang is a GT Premium model, and notable factory equipment includes a limited-slip differential, leather upholstery, heated and ventilated front seats, a rearview camera, and a 12-speaker Shaker Pro audio system. - Notable modifications reported by the seller include vinyl exterior stripes and PowerStop Z23 ceramic front brake pads. - Called S550 internally, the sixth-generation Mustang was introduced for 2015 with a wider and lower body than its predecessor. More importantly, the S550 was the first Mustang to feature an independent rear suspension across the whole model range, which significantly improved its handling and driving dynamics. - Power comes from a Coyote 5.0-liter V8, rated at 435 horsepower and 400 lb-ft of torque. Output is sent to the rear wheels via a 6-speed manual transmission.

item.title: 2009 Mercedes-Benz E63 AMG Sedan
item.description: THIS... is a 2009 Mercedes-Benz E63 AMG Sedan, finished in Calcite White with a black interior. - The attached Carfax vehicle history report shows no accidents or mileage discrepancies in this E63 AMG’s past. It also shows that this Mercedes-Benz has been registered in California since new. - According to the build sheet provided in the gallery, notable factory equipment includes the Premium 2 Package, 18-inch AMG wheels, a panoramic sunroof, heated and ventilated front seats, a Harman/Kardon sound system, and a Parktronic system. - A full list of notable modifications reported by the seller is detailed below. Highlights include a Weistec Engineering engine oil catch can, a Weistec Engineering engine oil filter housing, W212 E63 AMG exhaust mufflers, brake calipers finished in yellow, and mirror caps finished in black. - Mercedes-Benz launched the W211 E-Class for 2003. Stylists brought the sedan into the 21st century with a much sleeker design, and engineers went to great lengths to make the W211 more enjoyable to drive than its predecessor. The E63 replaced the range-topping E55 for 2007 with a bigger, naturally-aspirated V8 engine and subtle design tweaks. Production ended after the 2009 model year. - Power comes from an M156 6.2-liter V8, rated at 507 horsepower and 465 lb-ft of torque. Output is sent to the rear wheels via a 7-speed automatic transmission.

item.title: 2001 BMW M3 Convertible
item.description: THIS… is a 2001 BMW M3 Convertible, finished in Laguna Seca Blue with a black soft top and a gray interior. - This M3 features the desirable 6-speed manual transmission, and the odometer currently displays approximately 7,100 miles. - The attached Carfax history report contains multiple reporting gaps, though it shows no accidents or mileage discrepancies during the given time period. It also shows that this M3 has been registered to one owner mostly in California for the duration of the report. - According to the build sheet provided in the gallery, notable factory equipment includes 18-inch Style 67 wheels, Nappa leather upholstery, a Harman Kardon sound system, and more as detailed below. Notable modifications reported by the selling dealer are limited to an aftermarket rear lip spoiler. - Released for the 2001 model year, the third-generation M3 was based on the E46 3 Series but several performance-oriented improvements set the M variant apart. BMW notably gave the M3 a naturally-aspirated straight-6 engine, a completely redesigned suspension system, and quicker steering. Styling revisions gave it a more muscular design that nonetheless remained relatively subtle. - Power comes from an S54 3.2-liter straight-6 engine, rated at 333 horsepower and 262 lb-ft of torque. Output is sent to the rear wheels via a 6-speed manual transmission.

item.title: 2016 Jaguar XF 35t R-Sport
item.description: THIS... is a 2016 Jaguar XF 35t R-Sport, finished in British Racing Green with a Jet interior. - The odometer on this XF currently displays approximately 48,700 miles. - The attached Carfax vehicle history report shows no accidents or mileage discrepancies in this Jaguar’s past; it also shows Texas registrations since new. - A partial list of notable equipment reported by the seller includes 20-inch wheels, an R-Sport body kit, a power sunroof, and a Meridian sound system. The seller reports no notable modifications. - The second-generation XF, introduced in 2015, brought a more modern design and advanced technology to Jaguar's midsize luxury sedan lineup. The 35t R-Sport model, in particular, added sporty styling elements and performance upgrades, making it a compelling choice for those seeking a blend of luxury and performance. Its distinctive design, combined with Jaguar's reputation for refinement and performance, makes it a standout in its class. - Power comes from a 3.0-liter supercharged V6, rated at 340 horsepower and 332 lb-ft of torque. Output is sent to the rear wheels via an 8-speed automatic transmission.

item.title: 2013 Porsche Cayenne Diesel
item.description: THIS... is a 2013 Porsche Cayenne Diesel, finished in Dark Blue Metallic with a black interior, and offered by Auto_Alchemy_Florida, a Cars & Bids Certified Seller. - The attached Carfax history report lists no accidents or mileage discrepancies in this SUV's past. It also shows that this is a one-owner car. - A build sheet is provided in the gallery, and a partial list of notable equipment reported by the selling dealer includes the Convenience and Bose Audio packages, a panoramic roof, and front and rear parking sensors. The selling dealer reports no notable modifications. - Released for the 2011 model year, the second-generation Cayenne (called 958 internally) was slightly bigger and significantly lighter than its predecessor. It offered a smoother ride thanks to additional technology and luxury features, it was just as capable off-road, and critics agreed it was noticeably sportier than the first-generation model. Production ended in 2017. - Power comes from a 3.0-liter turbodiesel V6, rated at 240 horsepower and 406 lb-ft of torque. Output is sent to the four wheels via an 8-speed automatic transmission.

item.title: 2012 Mercedes-Benz SL63 AMG
item.description: THIS… is a 2012 Mercedes-Benz SL63 AMG, finished in Diamond White Metallic with a Stone and Dark Beige interior. - The odometer currently displays approximately 40,600 miles. - The attached Carfax vehicle history report shows no accidents or mileage discrepancies in this SL63’s past. - According to the window sticker provided in the gallery, notable factory equipment includes a power-retractable hardtop with a glass roof panel, heated and ventilated multicontour seats, a Harman/Kardon sound system, and Distronic adaptive cruise control. - Notable modifications reported by the selling dealer include 20-inch aftermarket wheels and a JVC head unit. - Called R230 internally, the first new SL of the 21st century made its debut for the 2003 model year as a replacement for the venerable R129 model. It was appreciably quicker and far more advanced than its predecessor, and it came standard with a power-retractable hardtop. - Power comes from a 6.2-liter V8, rated at 518 horsepower and 465 lb-ft of torque. Output is sent to the rear wheels via a 7-speed AMG Speedshift MCT automatic transmission.

item.title: 2014 BMW X3 xDrive35i
item.description: THIS... is a 2014 BMW X3 xDrive35i, finished in Alpine White with a beige interior. - The attached Carfax history report indicates no accidents or mileage discrepancies in this BMW’s past. It also shows that it has been registered in Florida and Georgia since new. - According to the build sheet provided in the gallery, this BMW X3 is an xDrive35i model, and notable factory equipment includes the Technology, Premium, and Cold Weather packages, 18-inch Style 308 wheels, xenon adaptive headlights, a panoramic sunroof, and heated rear seats. The seller reports no notable modifications. - The second-generation BMW X3, known as the F25, was introduced for the 2011 model year and marked a significant advancement in BMW’s compact luxury SUV lineup. It offered a blend of sporty handling and everyday practicality, appealing to drivers seeking both versatility and driving engagement. The xDrive35i variant is equipped with a powerful engine and a range of comfort and technology features, reflecting BMW’s focus on performance and refinement in the segment. - Power comes from a 3.0-liter turbocharged inline-6, rated at 300 horsepower and 300 lb-ft of torque. Output is sent to all four wheels via an 8-speed automatic transmission and BMW's xDrive permanent all-wheel drive system.

item.title: 2009 Cadillac XLR Platinum
item.description: THIS... is a 2009 Cadillac XLR Platinum, finished in Black Raven with an Ebony interior. - The attached Carfax vehicle history report indicates no accidents or mileage discrepancies in this XLR’s past; it also shows mostly Texas ownership since new. - According to the Monroney Label provided in the gallery, this XLR is a Platinum model, and notable factory equipment includes 18-inch wheels, Magnetic Ride Control suspension, a power-retractable hardtop, and a Bose sound system. - Notable modifications reported by the seller include an aftermarket display with Apple CarPlay and Android Auto and a rearview camera. - Released for 2003, the XLR brought Cadillac back to the roadster segment after a long hiatus. It was related to the sixth-generation Chevrolet Corvette, and the two models were built in the same facility, but it arrived as a more cruising-oriented convertible with a power-folding hardtop and a smoother Northstar V8 related to the unit that powered the STS. For the 2009 model year, the XLR received a facelift that introduced a new front fascia, rear diffuser, and chrome side fender vents. Production ended in 2009, and Cadillac reportedly built just over 15,000 units of the XLR. - Power comes from a Northstar 4.6-liter V8, rated at 320 horsepower and 310 lb-ft of torque. Output is sent to the rear wheels via a 6-speed automatic transmission.

item.title: 1990 Mazda MX-5 Miata
item.description: THIS... is a 1990 Mazda MX-5 Miata, finished in Classic Red with a body-colored hardtop and a black interior. - This Miata features a 5-speed manual transmission. - The attached Carfax vehicle history report contains multiple reporting gaps, though it shows no accidents or mileage discrepancies during the given time period. - A partial list of notable equipment reported by the seller includes a limited-slip differential, pop-up headlights, and cloth upholstery. - Notable modifications reported by the seller include Flyin' Miata V-Maxx Classic coilovers, a Flyin' Miata clutch/flywheel Happy Meal kit, 15-inch 949 Racing 6UL wheels, a MOMO steering wheel, a Voodoo shift knob, and RevLimiter gauges. - The first-generation MX-5 Miata, introduced in 1989, marked a return to the classic roadster formula: a lightweight, rear-wheel-drive two-seater with a simple, driver-focused interior. Its balanced handling, rev-happy engine, and affordable price made it an instant hit with enthusiasts and critics alike. Today, the first-generation Miata is still celebrated for its lightness, purity of design, and fabulous driving experience. - Power comes from a 1.6-liter inline-4, rated at 116 horsepower and 100 lb-ft of torque. Output is sent to the rear wheels via a 5-speed manual transmission.

item.title: 2015 Volvo V60 T6 R-Design Platinum
item.description: THIS… is a 2015 Volvo T6 R-Design Platinum, finished in Crystal White with a black interior. - The attached Carfax vehicle history report shows no accidents or mileage discrepancies in this Volvo’s past. - According to the digital window sticker provided in the gallery, this Volvo is a Platinum model, and notable factory equipment includes the Convenience, Technology, and Climate packages, 19-inch IXION wheels, and a Harman/Kardon sound system. The seller reports no notable modifications. - The V60 was new to the U.S. market for the 2015 model year, pairing a practical wagon body with the S60 sedan's luxurious interior. The T6 R-Design trim used the final iteration of Volvo's vaunted inline-6 engine and added performance-oriented styling cues inside and out. - Power comes from a 3.0-liter turbocharged inline-6 engine with Polestar performance software, rated at 325 horsepower and 354 lb-ft of torque. Power is sent to the four wheels via a 6-speed automatic transmission.

item.title: 2018 Audi S3
item.description: THIS... is a 2018 Audi S3, finished in Ara Blue Crystal Effect with a black interior. - This sedan's odometer displays about 35,700 miles. - The attached Carfax history report lists no accidents or mileage inconsistencies in this S3's past. - A window sticker is provided in the gallery, and a partial list of notable equipment reported by the seller includes the Technology, S Sport Seat, Black Optic Dynamic, and S Sport packages, LED headlights, and a panoramic sunroof. The only notable modification reported by the seller is an aftermarket rear spoiler. - Audi positioned the first-generation A3 Sedan at the bottom of its American range for the 2015 model year, and it simultaneously released the S3 as a sportier alternative. Built on the versatile MQB platform, both models offered the luxury, sharp styling, and performance that Audi is known for in a package that was smaller and more affordable than the A4. - Power comes from a 2.0-liter turbocharged 4-cylinder engine, rated at 292 horsepower and 280 lb-ft of torque. Output is sent to the four wheels via a 7-speed S Tronic automatic transmission and Audi's Quattro permanent all-wheel drive system.

item.title: 2000 Porsche Boxster
item.description: THIS... is a 2000 Porsche Boxster, finished in Ocean Blue Metallic with a gray soft top and gray interior. - This Boxster features the desirable 5-speed manual transmission. - The attached Carfax vehicle history report shows no accidents or mileage discrepancies in this Boxster’s past. It also shows that this Boxster has been registered mostly in the South since new. - A partial list of notable equipment reported by the seller includes a speed-activated rear spoiler, a power-retractable soft top, leather upholstery, automatic climate control, and cruise control. - Notable modifications reported by the seller include IMS bearing replacement, 18-inch Sport Design wheels, Super Cup exhaust, Softronics ECU tune, IPD plenum, aftermarket 74mm throttle body, BMC air filter, Antigravity lithium battery, and more, as detailed below. - The first-generation Boxster was introduced for the 1997 model year as Porsche’s entry-level roadster. It offered a mid-engine layout and balanced handling characteristics, aiming to provide an accessible yet engaging driving experience. Over the years, the Boxster has become recognized among enthusiasts for its driving dynamics and its role in expanding Porsche’s customer base. - Power comes from a 2.7-liter flat-6, rated at 217 horsepower and 192 lb-ft of torque in stock form. Due to the modifications performed to this Porsche, it may produce more power, but a dyno sheet was not provided to confirm. Output is sent to the rear wheels via a 5-speed manual transmission.

item.title: 2020 Chevrolet Corvette Stingray Coupe
item.description: THIS… is a 2020 Chevrolet Corvette Stingray Coupe, finished in black with a Jet Black interior. - The odometer on this Corvette currently displays approximately 5,500 miles. - The attached Carfax vehicle history report shows no accidents or mileage discrepancies in this Corvette’s past. It also shows that it’s been registered to one owner since new. - According to the copy of the window sticker provided in the gallery, notable factory equipment includes 19-inch front and 20-inch rear wheels, a limited-slip differential, a removable roof panel, leather upholstery, and a Bose sound system. The selling dealer reports no notable modifications. - Released for 2020, the eighth-generation Corvette switched to a mid-mounted engine, a configuration that represented the most drastic change in the nameplate's decades-long history. Placing the V8 behind the passenger compartment allowed designers to completely reinvent the Corvette's proportions, while engineers took advantage of the rear-biased weight distribution to dial in sharper handling. - Power comes from an LT2 6.2-liter V8, rated at 490 horsepower and 465 lb-ft of torque. Output is sent to the rear wheels via an 8-speed dual-clutch automatic transmission.

item.title: 2023 Jaguar F-Pace SVR
item.description: THIS… is a 2023 Jaguar F-Pace SVR, finished in Ultra Blue with an Ebony interior. - The attached Carfax vehicle history report shows no mileage discrepancies in this Jaguar’s past. - According to the window sticker provided in the gallery, this Jaguar cost $95,825 new. A partial list of notable equipment includes the Black Exterior Pack, 22-inch wheels, a panoramic roof, heated and cooled front seats, and a Meridian sound system. The seller reports no notable modifications. - Launched for 2017, the F-Pace offers the luxury and performance that buyers expect from a Jaguar in an SUV package; it was the firm's first entry into the segment. Engineers relied extensively on aluminum to keep weight in check and to improve handling, which is a big part of what allows the F-Pace to avoid stepping on Land Rover's toes. - Power comes from a 5.0-liter supercharged V8, rated at 550 horsepower and 502 lb-ft of torque. Output is sent to all four wheels via an 8-speed automatic transmission.

item.title: 1999 Toyota Century
item.description: THIS... is a 1999 Toyota Century, finished in white with a black interior. - This Century is a Japanese-spec sedan that's titled and located in Pennsylvania. - A partial list of notable equipment reported by the seller includes the Dual Electro Multi-Vision Package, 16-inch wheels, leather upholstery, heated and power-adjustable front and rear seats, and massaging and reclining rear seats. - Notable modifications reported by the seller are limited to aftermarket window rain guards and a Japanese toll card reader. - Toyota's home-market flagship sedan has been in production since 1967, and the second-generation model (called G50 internally) was sold from 1997 to 2017. Aimed at wealthy yet restrained buyers, this stout luxury sedan featured every bit of comfort and tech wizardry that Toyota had access to at the time and a big V12 engine, and it's commonly acknowledged by journalists as one of the finest-built cars anywhere. - Power comes from a 5.0-liter V12, rated at about 276 horsepower and 355 lb-ft of torque. Output is sent to the rear wheels via a 4-speed automatic transmission.

item.title: 2006 Nissan 350Z Enthusiast Roadster
item.description: THIS... is a 2006 Nissan 350Z Enthusiast Roadster, finished in LeMans Sunset Metallic with a black soft top and a Burnt Orange and black interior. - This 350Z features the desirable 6-speed manual transmission, and the odometer currently displays approximately 19,700 miles. - A partial list of notable equipment reported by the seller includes a limited-slip differential, a power-operated soft top, heated seats, and automatic climate control. - Notable modifications reported by the seller include an aftermarket air intake, an aftermarket exhaust, 18-inch NISMO wheels, a GReddy strut tower bar, a carbon fiber rear spoiler, and a Kenwood head unit. - Nissan re-launched the Z-car with the Z33 350Z in 2003 after a multi-year hiatus following the retirement of the 300ZX. The 350Z offered excellent handling thanks partly to a front-mid-mounted engine and rear-wheel drive. It rode on a platform shared with the contemporary Infiniti G35 and offered the most powerful version of the well-regarded VQ engine in the Nissan lineup. - Power comes from a 3.5-liter V6, rated at 306 horsepower and 268 lb-ft of torque. Output is sent to the rear wheels via a 6-speed manual transmission.

item.title: 2009 Porsche 911 Targa 4
item.description: THIS... is a 2009 Porsche 911 Targa 4, finished in Carrara White with a black interior. - The odometer on this 911 Targa 4 currently displays approximately 48,500 miles. - The attached Carfax vehicle history report shows no mileage discrepancies in this Porsche’s past. It also shows registration to two owners in Florida and Texas since new. - According to the window sticker provided in the gallery, this 911 Targa 4 cost $115,015 new. A partial list of notable equipment includes the Sport Chrono Plus and Bose High End Sound Packages, 19-inch Carrera S II wheels, Porsche Ceramic Composite Brakes (PCCB), a sliding glass Targa roof panel, adaptive sport seats, heated front seats, and a navigation system. Notable modifications reported by the seller are limited to clear side marker lights, radiator screens, and a stick-on spot mirror. - Porsche released the 997-generation 911 for 2005 with a more powerful engine than the outgoing model, oval headlights, and a redesigned interior. Engineers made the front and rear tracks wider for better stability and interior designers paid more attention to the build quality. The end result was a more refined 911 that nonetheless remained true to its roots. - Porsche's 997.2 generation introduced Direct Fuel Injection (DFI) engines, replacing the earlier 997.1 models which used M97 engines with indirect fuel injection. These new MA1 engines were a significant upgrade, delivering more power (20-30 hp more in Carrera models) while simultaneously reducing fuel consumption by up to 10%. They also improved reliability by eliminating the Intermediate Shaft (IMS) bearing, a known issue in the 997.1 models. - Power comes from a 3.6-liter flat-6, rated at 345 horsepower and 288 lb-ft of torque. Output is sent to the four wheels via a 7-speed PDK dual-clutch automatic transmission.

item.title: 2006 Mercedes-Benz SLK55 AMG
item.description: THIS... is a 2006 Mercedes-Benz SLK55 AMG, finished in black with a black interior. - The attached Carfax vehicle history report shows no mileage discrepancies in this SLK55 AMG’s past. It also shows that this Mercedes-Benz has been mostly registered in Western and Southern states since new. - According to the build sheet provided in the gallery, notable factory equipment includes the Premium, Lighting, and Entertainment packages, 18-inch AMG wheels, a power-retractable hardtop, and an Airscarf neck-level heating system. - Notable modifications reported by the seller are limited to tinted front bumper reflectors and carbon fiber-style interior trim. - Introduced for the 2005 model year, the R171-generation SLK featured a number of revisions compared to its R170 predecessor. Changes include a longer wheelbase, overall length and width, an updated exterior design, and an available 7-speed automatic transmission. The second-generation SLK also benefitted from a revised roof mechanism, which Mercedes-Benz designed to be deployable in 22 seconds and increase trunk storage while the roof is down. Production ended in 2011. - Power comes from a 5.4-liter V8, rated at 355 horsepower and 376 lb-ft of torque. Output is sent to the rear wheels via a 7-speed automatic transmission.

item.title: 2008 BMW 650i Convertible
item.description: THIS... is a 2008 BMW 650i Convertible, finished in Alpine White with a black soft top and a cream beige interior. - The attached Carfax vehicle history report contains a reporting gap between 2008 and 2011, though it shows no accidents or mileage discrepancies during the given time period. It also shows California and Texas registrations since new. - According to the window sticker provided in the gallery, notable factory equipment includes the Sport and Premium Sound packages, a power-retractable soft top, a navigation system, and Comfort Access keyless entry. - Notable modifications reported by the seller are limited to wheels refinished in black, an M stripe decal on the lower front bumper, and an aftermarket emblems. - BMW resurrected the 6 Series nameplate after a long hiatus when it released the E63-generation model for the 2004 model year. Also offered as a convertible (E64), it arrived as a 4-seater GT that put an equal focus on performance and luxury. It embodied Chris Bangle's approach to design and the sheet metal hid components shared with the 5 Series. - Power comes from a 4.8-liter V8, rated at about 360 horsepower and 360 lb-ft of torque. Output is sent to the rear wheels via a 6-speed automatic transmission.

item.title: 2022 Ford F-150 Lightning Lariat
item.description: THIS... is a 2022 Ford F-150 Lightning Lariat, finished in Carbonized Gray Metallic with a black interior. - The attached Carfax history report indicates no accidents or mileage discrepancies in this F-150's past. - According to the window sticker provided in the gallery, this F-150 cost $79,269 new, and a partial list of notable factory equipment includes Equipment Group 511A, 20-inch wheels, an E-Lock rear axle, heated and ventilated front seats, and a Bang & Olufsen sound system. The seller reports no notable modifications. - Formerly used on a high-performance variant of the F-150, the Lightning nameplate was revived for the 2022 model year for Ford's first series-produced electric truck. Every member of the line-up offers dual electric motors for through-the-road four-wheel drive, but buyers have two battery packs to choose from, and driving range varies accordingly. The F-150 Lightning is still available new today. - Power comes from a pair of electric motors (one per axle) that draw electricity from a 131-kilowatt-hour lithium-ion battery pack to power all four wheels with 580 horsepower and 775 lb-ft of torque, according to third-party estimates. The Lightning received a maximum driving range rating of 320 miles from the EPA with the extended-range battery.

item.title: 1972 Volkswagen Super Beetle Convertible
item.description: THIS... is a 1972 Volkswagen Super Beetle Convertible, finished in red with a beige soft top and a white interior. - A partial list of notable currently installed equipment reported by the seller includes 15-inch wheels, a folding soft top, and vinyl upholstery. - One of the most prolific and recognizable cars of the 20th century, the iconic Volkswagen Beetle holds the title for the longest-produced vehicle on a single platform. While the Super Beetle retired from the American market after the 1979 model year, the standard Beetle remained in production in Mexico until July 2003. Fans of the Bug praise it for its simplicity and raw driving experience, owing in part to its rear-engine, rear-wheel drive layout and limited amenities. - Power comes from a carbureted 1.6-liter air-cooled flat-4, rated at about 46 horsepower and 72 lb-ft of torque. Output is sent to the rear wheels via a 4-speed manual transmission.

item.title: 2000 BMW Z3 M Roadster
item.description: THIS... is a 2000 BMW Z3 M Roadster, finished in Evergreen with an Evergreen and black interior. - The attached Carfax history report lists no accidents in this Z3 M's past. It also shows registrations to one owner since 2007. - According to the build sheet provided in the gallery, notable factory equipment includes 17-inch Style 40 wheels, a limited-slip differential, Nappa leather upholstery, heated seats, and a Harman/Kardon sound system. The seller reports no notable modifications. - Based on the Z3, the M Roadster made its debut in 1998 with a more powerful engine shared with the E36 M3, a sportier suspension system, and wider wheel arches, among other changes. It was immediately hailed as one of the best driver's cars on the market. - Power comes from an S52 3.2-liter inline-6, rated at 240 horsepower and 236 lb-ft of torque. Output is sent to the rear wheels via a 5-speed manual transmission.

item.title: 2020 Aston Martin Vantage
item.description: THIS... is a 2020 Aston Martin Vantage, finished in Lunar White with an Obsidian Black interior. - The attached Carfax history report lists no accidents in this Vantage's past. - According to the build sheet provided in the gallery, notable factory equipment includes the Exterior Black Plus, Comfort, and Technology collections, 20-inch 10-spoke Shadow Chrome wheels, and an Aston Martin premium audio system. Notable modifications reported by the seller are limited to an Apple CarPlay retrofit kit. - Aston Martin released the new Vantage for the 2018 model year to replace the outgoing model, which had been on sale since 2006. Much like its DB11 sibling, the Vantage uses Mercedes-Benz's COMAND infotainment system and the AMG M177 twin-turbocharged V8 engine. - Power comes from an AMG-sourced 4.0-liter twin-turbocharged V8, rated at 503 horsepower and 505 lb-ft of torque. Output is sent to the rear wheels via an 8-speed automatic transmission.

item.title: 2015 BMW M3
item.description: THIS... is a 2015 BMW M3, finished in Yas Marina Blue Metallic with a Silverstone interior. - The attached Carfax history report shows no mileage discrepancies in this M3’s past. It also confirms that this is a one-owner car that's been registered in California from new. - According to the window sticker provided in the gallery, notable factory equipment includes the Executive Package, 18-inch Style 513M wheels, adaptive M suspension, extended Merino leather upholstery, heated front and rear seats, carbon fiber interior trim, and a Harman Kardon sound system. The seller reports no notable modifications. - BMW's fifth-generation M3 went on sale for the 2015 model year. Based on the F30-generation 3 Series, and called the F80 internally, it swapped its predecessor's V8 for a twin-turbocharged straight-6 and picked up more horsepower and a lot more torque along the way. Production ended in 2018. - Power comes from a twin-turbocharged 3.0-liter straight-6, rated at 425 horsepower and 406 lb-ft of torque. It spins the rear wheels via a 7-speed dual-clutch automatic transmission.

item.title: 1957 Cadillac Series 62 Hardtop Sedan
item.description: THIS... is a 1957 Cadillac Series 62 Hardtop Sedan, finished in white with a red and white interior. - This Cadillac appeared in a Key by Cars & Bids episode, and the video is embedded below. - The selling dealer states that this Series 62 was restored before the titled owner purchased it in 2013. - A partial list of notable currently installed equipment reported by the selling dealer includes dual 4-barrel Edelbrock carburetors, lowered suspension, vinyl upholstery, an Autronic Eye automatic headlight dimmer system, a bluetooth-compatible head unit, and a battery cut-off switch. - Cadillac positioned the Series 62 as its entry-level model for the 1955 model year, though "entry-level" was a highly relative term. With stately styling characterized by numerous chrome accents and an interior that was both luxurious and spacious, the Series 62 was available in several body styles including a sedan, a convertible, and the Coupe de Ville. The Series 62 nameplate retired after the 1964 model year. - Power comes from a 365-cubic-inch V8. Output is sent to the rear wheels via a 4-speed automatic transmission.

item.title: 2018 Audi R8 V10 Coupe RWS
item.description: THIS… is a 2018 Audi R8 V10 Coupe RWS, finished in Tango Red Metallic with a black interior. - The attached Carfax vehicle history report shows no mileage discrepancies in this R8’s past. It also confirms it’s a one-owner car that's been registered in Tennessee and New Mexico since new. - According to the window sticker provided in the gallery, notable factory equipment includes 19-inch wheels, red-painted brake calipers, fine Nappa leather upholstery, sport seats, and Audi Virtual Cockpit. The seller reports no notable modifications. - Introduced for 2017, the second-generation R8 received rave reviews from enthusiasts and journalists alike. It's powered by a naturally-aspirated V10 that's closely related to the engine found in the Lamborghini Huracán, and it offers drivers a fun blend of mid-engined handling and sure-footedness. - The R8 RWS is a track-focused limited-edition model that saves weight and adds excitement by eliminating its Quattro all-wheel drive configuration in favor of a simpler rear-wheel drive layout. This is 1 of 999 RWS models produced worldwide, and 1 of 320 U.S. market examples. - Power comes from a 5.2-liter V10, rated at 532 horsepower and 398 lb-ft of torque. Output is sent to the rear wheels via a 7-speed S tronic dual-clutch automatic transmission.

item.title: 2015 Aston Martin V12 Vantage S
item.description: THIS... is a 2015 Aston Martin V12 Vantage S, finished in gray with a black interior. - The odometer on this V12 Vantage S currently displays approximately 8,700 miles. - The attached Carfax vehicle history report shows no accidents or mileage discrepancies in this Aston Martin’s past. It also shows that this Aston Martin has been registered in California and Arizona since new. - A partial list of notable equipment reported by the seller includes 19-inch wheels, carbon ceramic brakes, a limited-slip differential, an Adaptive Damping System (ADS), carbon fiber exterior trim, leather and Alcantara upholstery, and heated seats. The seller reports no notable modifications. - The V12 Vantage S was introduced as the most powerful and performance-oriented version of the Vantage lineup. It features a large-displacement naturally aspirated engine, track-focused technology, and a lightweight chassis, distinguishing it from the standard Vantage. For enthusiasts, the V12 Vantage S stands out as one of the last models in its segment to offer a V12 engine in a compact, rear-wheel-drive package. - Power comes from a 5.9-liter V12, rated at 565 horsepower and 457 lb-ft of torque. Output is sent to the rear wheels via a 7-speed Sportshift III automated-manual transmission.

item.title: 2010 Jaguar XKR Convertible
item.description: THIS... is a 2010 Jaguar XKR Convertible, finished in Indigo Blue with a blue soft top and a Caramel interior. - The attached Carfax vehicle history report lists no mileage discrepancies in this XKR's past. - According to the build sheet provided in the gallery, notable factory equipment includes 20-inch Kalimnos wheels, heated and ventilated front seats, a Bowers & Wilkins sound system, and a front and rear parking aid. The seller reports no notable modifications. - Called X150 internally, the second-generation Jaguar XK arrived for the 2007 model year with a head-turning design penned by Ian Callum and an aluminum structure to keep weight in check. The range included naturally-aspirated and supercharged engines as well as coupes and convertibles. 2010 brought bigger and more powerful engines across the range and subtle exterior revisions, and production of Jaguar's Porsche 911 fighter ended in 2014. The model was replaced by the F-Type. - Power comes from a 5.0-liter supercharged V8, rated at 510 horsepower and 461 lb-ft of torque. It spins the rear wheels via a 6-speed automatic transmission.

item.title: 2000 Honda S2000
item.description: THIS… is a 2000 Honda S2000, finished in Silverstone Metallic with a black soft top and a black and red interior. - The attached Carfax vehicle history report shows no mileage discrepancies in this S2000’s past. - A partial list of notable equipment reported by the seller includes 16-inch wheels, a limited-slip differential, a power-operated soft top, leather upholstery, and air conditioning. Notable modifications reported by the seller include a soft top with a glass rear window and a Sony head unit. - The Honda S2000 (known as AP1 internally) was introduced for the 2000 model year; its model designation references the engine's 2000cc displacement, and its per-liter output was the highest of any naturally aspirated regular-production car at the time. The AP1 also boasted 50/50 weight distribution and independently-sprung, double-wishbone suspension at each corner. - Power comes from a 2.0-liter inline-4, rated at 240 horsepower and 153 lb-ft of torque. Output is sent to the rear wheels via a 6-speed manual transmission.

item.title: 2017 Chevrolet Camaro ZL1 Coupe
item.description: THIS… is a 2017 Chevrolet Camaro ZL1 Coupe, finished in Red Hot with a black interior. - This Camaro features a 6-speed manual transmission. - The attached Carfax history report indicates no accidents in this Camaro’s past. It also shows that this Camaro has been registered in California and Alabama since new. - This Camaro is a ZL1 Coupe model. A partial list of notable equipment reported by the seller includes 20-inch forged wheels, a Magnetic Ride Control suspension, an exposed carbon fiber hood insert, front lip, and rear spoiler, leather and sueded microfiber upholstery, heated and ventilated Recaro seats, a heated steering wheel, and a Bose sound system. - Notable modifications reported by the seller include a K&N air filter, upgraded front shocks and springs, a Hotchkis rear suspension pack, a suspension lowering kit, a secondary supercharger cooling reservoir, and a short-throw shifter. - The Camaro ZL1 was introduced in 2012 as a high-performance variant of the Camaro lineup. It was designed to compete with the most powerful muscle cars on the market, boasting a supercharged V8 engine, track-ready suspension, and aggressive styling cues. Despite its performance-oriented nature, the ZL1 still offers a comfortable and well-equipped interior, making it a compelling choice for those seeking a balance between performance and everyday usability. - Power comes from a supercharged 6.2-liter V8, rated at 650 horsepower and 650 lb-ft of torque in stock form. Due to the modifications performed to this Camaro, it likely produces more power, but a dyno sheet was not provided to confirm. Output is sent to the rear wheels via a 6-speed manual transmission.

item.title: 1999 Land Rover Discovery II
item.description: THIS... is a 1999 Land Rover Discovery II, finished in blue with a tan interior. - This Discovery II’s factory-fitted 4.0-liter V8 has been swapped with a 5.3-liter V8 from a 2002 GMC Yukon. - The attached Carfax vehicle history report shows no accidents or mileage discrepancies in this Land Rover’s past; it also shows Oregon and Nevada registrations since new. - A partial list of notable equipment reported by the seller includes 16-inch alloy wheels, a locking center differential, leather upholstery, and a Harman/Kardon sound system. - A full list of notable modifications reported by the seller is detailed below. Highlights include a 5.3-liter V8 engine swap sourced from a 2002 GMC Yukon, a standalone transmission controller, an unlocked and reconfigured ECU, custom exhaust with aftermarket headers, a 2.5-inch suspension lift kit, an Atlantic British front bumper, Hannibal Safari Equipment rack, Dynamat installed on the roof and sides, and subwoofer speakers in the stock rear door compartment. - Land Rover introduced the Discovery II for the 1999 model year. It was an evolution of its predecessor that reflected the brand's upmarket shift with a more refined cabin, though it remained exceptionally capable off-road. 2003 brought an update that included headlights styled like the ones on the bigger Range Rover and a 4.6-liter V8. Production ended in 2004. - Power comes from a 5.3-liter V8 engine, which produces about 285 horsepower and 325 lb-ft of torque in stock form. Due to the modifications performed to this Discovery II, it may produce more power, but a dyno sheet was not provided to confirm. Output is sent to all four wheels via a 4-speed automatic transmission.

item.title: 1995 Mazda RX-7
item.description: THIS… is a 1995 Mazda RX-7, finished in Vintage Red with a tan interior. - This RX-7 is equipped with the desirable 5-speed manual transmission. - The engine in this RX-7 was rebuilt in August 2010 at approximately 94,000 miles. - The attached Carfax vehicle history report shows no mileage discrepancies in this RX-7’s past. It also shows that this Mazda has been registered to 1 owner since new. - A partial list of notable equipment reported by the seller includes a Torsen limited-slip differential, pop-up headlights, leather upholstery, air conditioning, and power windows and locks. - A full list of notable modifications reported by the seller is detailed below. Highlights include a BNR Supercars turbo setup, APEXi Power dual air intakes, a catalytic converter delete, and GlowShift gauge pods mounted on the A-pillar. - Mazda's third-generation RX-7 made its American debut for the 1993 model year, and it was praised by enthusiasts and journalists alike as a significant improvement over its predecessor. It's more fluid lines aligned it with the design trends of the 1990s, and the twin-turbocharged Wankel engine gave it Porsche-like performance without the price tag. Production of the FD-generation RX-7 ended in 2002. - Power comes from a 1.3-liter sequentially-turbocharged 13B-REW twin-rotor Wankel engine, rated at about 255 horsepower and 217 lb-ft of torque in stock form. According to the dyno sheet pictured in the gallery, this RX-7 now produces 333 horsepower and 265 lb-ft of torque. Output is sent to the rear wheels via a 5-speed manual transmission.

item.title: 2001 Chevrolet Corvette Convertible
item.description: THIS... is a 2001 Chevrolet Corvette Convertible, finished in Light Pewter Metallic with a Charcoal Metallic exterior wrap, a beige soft top, and a Light Oak interior. - The attached Carfax history report lists no accidents or mileage discrepancies in this Corvette's past. It also shows that this car has been registered to one owner since 2013. - A window sticker is provided in the gallery, and a partial list of notable equipment reported by the seller includes the Performance Handling Package, a limited-slip differential, a power-folding soft top, and a Bose sound system. - Notable modifications reported by the seller include 18-inch front and 19-inch rear Cray wheels, black exterior emblems, and a wind deflector. - Released for the 1997 model year, the fifth-generation Corvette wore a more streamlined exterior design than its predecessor, though it retained the pop-up headlights. It also gained a new V8 engine and a rear-mounted transaxle that improved weight distribution while freeing more space in the cabin.
