Chevrolet released a convertible model for 1998, and production ended in 2004. - Power comes from a 5.7-liter V8, rated at 350 horsepower and 360 lb-ft of torque. Output is sent to the rear wheels via a 4-speed automatic transmission.

item.title: 2022 Tesla Model 3 Performance
item.description: THIS... is a 2022 Tesla Model 3 Performance, finished in Pearl White Multi-Coat with a black interior. - The attached Carfax vehicle history report lists no accidents or mileage discrepancies in this Model 3's past. It also confirms one owner and California registration from new. - According to the window sticker provided in the gallery, this Model 3 is a Performance model, and notable factory equipment includes 20-inch Überturbine wheels , a carbon fiber spoiler, a premium interior, heated front and rear seats, a 15-inch center touchscreen, and Autopilot technology. The seller reports no notable modifications. - Positioned as Tesla's entry-level car, the Model 3 was celebrated as a premium EV with a usable range and respectable performance, all at a reasonably attainable price. It's still available today, and it has gone through several evolutions (including many software updates) since its introduction. - Power comes from a pair of electric motors that draw electricity from an 82-kilowatt-hour lithium-ion battery pack to zap the four wheels with approximately 470 horsepower, according to third-party estimates. This Model 3's maximum driving range was rated at 315 miles in 2022 by the EPA.

item.title: 1992 Ford F-250 XLT 4x4
item.description: THIS… is a 1992 Ford F-250 XLT 4x4, finished in Currant Red and Wimbledon White with a black interior. - The attached Carfax vehicle history report has several gaps, though it indicates no accidents or mileage discrepancies for the given time period. - A partial list of notable equipment reported by the seller includes 16-inch wheels, a bedliner, air conditioning, and cruise control. - Notable modifications reported by the seller include a Ramsey front bumper and winch, a lift kit, black leather upholstery with red piping, and an Apple CarPlay head unit. - Ford introduced the ninth generation of the perennially popular F-Series for the 1992 model year. Offered in a dizzying number of configurations, the truck benefited from a redesigned front end characterized by more aerodynamic lights and a bigger grille, as well as a new-look dashboard. - Power comes from a 7.5-liter V8, rated at 245 horsepower and 395 lb-ft of torque. Output is sent to the rear or all four wheels via a 4-speed automatic transmission and a 2-speed transfer case.

item.title: 2005 Porsche Cayenne Turbo
item.description: THIS... is a 2005 Porsche Cayenne Turbo, finished in Jarama Beige Metallic with a Havanna and Sand Beige interior. - The attached Carfax vehicle history report indicates no mileage discrepancies in this Cayenne Turbo’s past. - According to the build sheet provided in the gallery, this Cayenne is a Turbo model, and notable factory equipment includes the Convenience, Light Comfort, and Leather packages, and a Bose audio system. - Notable modifications reported by the seller includes a Eurowise 3-inch lift kit, 13,000-lb winch, "Cayenne S Transsyberia" exterior graphics, and orange-painted wheels and mirror caps. - Called 955 internally, the first-generation Cayenne made its American debut for the 2003 model year. It was a hugely controversial model at launch, but it quickly won over skeptics with its unusual blend of on-road performance and off-road prowess. It retired as the best-selling member of the Porsche range in 2010, and its replacement arrived shortly after. - Power comes from a 4.5-liter twin-turbocharged V8 engine, rated at 450 horsepower and 457 lb-ft of torque. Output is sent to all four wheels through a 6-speed automatic transmission.

item.title: 2007 BMW M5
item.description: THIS... is a 2007 BMW M5, finished in Interlagos Blue Metallic with a black interior. - This M5 features the desirable 6-speed manual transmission, and its odometer currently displays about 67,800 miles. - The attached Carfax vehicle history report indicates no mileage discrepancies in this M5’s past. - According to the build sheet provided in the gallery, notable factory equipment includes 19-inch Style 166M wheels, an M variable differential lock, and a power sunroof. - Notable modifications reported by the seller include an Eisenmann exhaust system, KW coilovers, and black-finished wheels. - Based on the E60-generation 5 Series, the fourth-generation M5 made its debut for the 2006 model year with a mighty V10 engine between its vented fenders. It followed its segment's shift towards technology and luxury by offering enthusiasts a longer list of equipment than its predecessor, including a power button and configurable driving modes. Production ended in 2010, and BMW hasn't released another naturally-aspirated M5 since. - Power comes from a 5.0-liter V10, rated at 500 horsepower and 383 lb-ft of torque. Output is sent to the rear wheels via a 6-speed manual transmission.

item.title: 2014 Jeep Grand Cherokee SRT
item.description: THIS... is a 2014 Jeep Grand Cherokee SRT, finished in Bright White Clear Coat with a Sepia interior. - The attached Carfax vehicle history report lists no mileage discrepancies in this Grand Cherokee's past; it also shows Southern ownership since new. - A partial list of notable equipment reported by the seller includes 20-inch wheels, Brembo brakes, an electronic limited-slip rear differential, adaptive bi-xenon headlights, leather upholstery, heated front and rear seats, and adaptive cruise control. - Notable modifications reported by the seller are limited to an aFe Power air intake and an aftermarket tailgate badge. - Jeep demonstrated a completely different side of the WK2-generation Grand Cherokee when it released the SRT8 model for 2012. This version of the big SUV wasn't built to explore the wilderness: it was developed for on-pavement performance thanks to a Hemi V8 engine, an adaptive suspension system, and massive brakes. Jeep dropped the "8" from the name in 2014, and production ended in 2021. - Power comes from a 6.4-liter V8, rated at 470 horsepower and 465 lb-ft of torque. It spins all four wheels via an 8-speed automatic transmission.

item.title: 1995 BMW M3 Coupe
item.description: THIS... is a 1995 BMW M3 Coupe, finished in Alpine White with a black interior. - The attached Carfax history report indicates no accidents or mileage discrepancies in this M3's past. - According to the window sticker provided in the gallery, this M3 cost $38,645 new. A partial list of notable factory equipment includes a limited-slip differential, a power sunroof, leather upholstery, "Vader" heated front sport seats, and dual-zone climate control. - Notable modifications reported by the selling dealer are extensive, and the full list is detailed below. Highlights include a Chevrolet LS2 6.0-liter engine swap with polished aluminum intake manifold and 102mm throttle body by Professional Products, a rebuilt Tremec T56 6-speed manual transmission swap, a COMP Cams Stage 3 camshaft, a Powergrip HD clutch kit, a rebuilt cylinder head, a valve lifter kit, a CXRACING header and mid-pipe exhaust system, a stainless-steel rear exhaust, 18-inch BBS wheels, a MaXpeedingRods coilover suspension kit, Eibach rear springs and rear bar, a VIS Racing carbon fiber hood, and a JL Audio amplifier and subwoofer. - The E36 generation of the iconic BMW M3 was the first M3 powered by an inline-6 engine. Originally, the United States was not slated to get an M3. After owners famously banded together and demanded one be made, BMW brought the M3 to the U.S. market with a de-tuned and simpler engine than the European M3 due to emissions restrictions. It was a major commercial success for BMW, and it cemented the BMW M brand in the U.S. - Power comes from an LS2 6.0-liter V8. Output is sent to the rear wheels via a 6-speed manual transmission.

item.title: 2014 Porsche Panamera S
item.description: THIS… is a 2014 Porsche Panamera S, finished in Dark Blue Metallic with a Luxor Beige interior. - The attached Carfax history report indicates no accidents or mileage discrepancies in this Panamera’s past. It also shows that it's been registered in Southern and Western states since new. - According to the build sheet provided in the gallery, this Panamera is an S model, and notable factory equipment includes the Premium and Bose Audio packages, 20-inch 911 Turbo II wheels, soft-close doors, and ventilated front seats. The seller reports no notable modifications. - After several false starts, Porsche entered the sedan segment for the first time when it launched the original Panamera for 2010. While its design and its very existence were controversial, the Panamera ultimately drew praise as the sportiest model in its segment and it achieved this distinction without sacrificing comfort or luxury. The Turbo S model sat at the top of the lineup, with the Executive trim adding an additional 6 inches to the wheelbase to better accommodate chauffeur-driven rear seat occupants. - Power comes from a 3.0-liter twin-turbocharged V6, rated at 420 horsepower and 384 lb-ft of torque. Output is sent to the rear wheels via a 7-speed dual-clutch automatic transmission.

item.title: 2013 BMW X5 xDrive35i
item.description: THIS... is a 2013 BMW X5 xDrive35i, finished in Platinum Grey Metallic with a black interior, and offered by longimotorsports, a Cars & Bids Certified Seller. - The attached Carfax vehicle history report indicates no mileage discrepancies in this X5’s past. It also shows California ownership since new. - According to the build sheet provided in the gallery, this X5 is an xDrive35i model, and notable factory equipment includes 19-inch Style 334 wheels, a panoramic sunroof, Nevada leather upholstery, heated front seats, soft-close automatic doors, Comfort Access, and Park Distance Control. The selling dealer reports no notable modifications. - Called E70 internally, the second-generation X5 was sold in the United States between the 2007 and 2013 model years. It brought larger exterior dimensions, a new suspension system, and an available third-row seat in addition to a host of new technology features. - Power comes from a turbocharged 3.0-liter inline-6, rated at 300 horsepower and 300 lb-ft of torque. Output is sent to all four wheels via an 8-speed automatic transmission and BMW's xDrive all-wheel drive system.

item.title: 2005 Ford Mustang GT Roush Coupe
item.description: THIS... is a 2005 Ford Mustang GT Roush Coupe, finished in Satin Silver Metallic with a Dark Charcoal and Dove interior. - This Mustang is equipped with the desirable 5-speed manual transmission, and its odometer currently displays approximately 26,800 miles. - The attached Carfax vehicle history report shows no accidents or mileage discrepancies in this Ford’s past; it also shows registrations to one owner since new. - A partial list of notable equipment reported by the seller includes a limited-slip differential, air conditioning, and an 8-speaker Shaker 500 sound system. - A full list of notable modifications reported by the seller is detailed below. Highlights include Roush exterior and interior components, a Roush performance air induction kit, Roush sport seats, and carbon fiber interior trim. - Called S197 internally, the fifth-generation Mustang launched for 2005 with a heritage-laced design, a new platform, and an available 24-valve V8 engine. Extending the wheelbase gave the Mustang a much more compliant ride than its predecessor, though it remained true to the pony car ethos that characterized the original model. Production ended in 2014. - Power comes from a 4.6-liter V8, rated at about 300 horsepower and 320 lb-ft of torque in stock form. Due to the modifications performed to this Mustang, it may produce more power, but a dyno sheet was not provided to confirm. Output is sent to the rear wheels via a 5-speed manual transmission.

item.title: 2012 BMW 335i Convertible
item.description: THIS... is a 2012 BMW 335i Convertible, finished in Black Sapphire Metallic with a Saddle Brown interior. - According to the build sheet provided in the gallery, notable factory equipment includes the M Sport Package, a power-retractable hardtop, adaptive xenon headlights, Dakota leather upholstery, heated front seats, and a Harman/Kardon sound system. - Notable modifications reported by the seller include 17-inch Borbet Type Y wheels, an aFe Power air intake, an aftermarket intercooler, an ECU tune, and a NavTool Apple CarPlay/Android Auto interface. - Called E93 internally, the last 3 Series convertible made its debut for the 2007 model year. It was longer and wider than its predecessor, and it offered a more extensive list of technology features, including a power-operated hardtop. The 335i was positioned at the top of the non-M-tuned range and received BMW's first turbocharged engine in decades. Production ended in 2013. - Power comes from an N55 3.0-liter turbocharged straight-6, rated at 300 horsepower and 300 lb-ft of torque when stock. Due to the modifications performed to this 335i, it may produce more power, but a dyno sheet was not provided to confirm. Output is sent to the rear wheels via a 6-speed automatic transmission.

item.title: 1999 Honda Acty
item.description: THIS... is a 1999 Honda Acty, finished in blue and red with a gray interior. - This Acty is a right-hand drive, Japanese-market kei truck that's titled in Ohio. It's equipped with a metric instrument cluster, and its odometer displays about 21,900 kilometers, which represents approximately 13,600 miles. - A partial list of notable equipment reported by the seller includes drop-down and removable bed sides, cloth and vinyl upholstery, and air conditioning. Notable modifications reported by the seller include black finish on wheels and a Kenwood head unit - The Acty is a quirky utilitarian truck designed to adhere to Japanese taxation measures for kei vehicles. This highly configurable vehicle comes in truck and van forms, can be optioned with 2- or 4-wheel drive, and is commonly used as an in-town cargo hauler. - Power comes from a 656cc inline-3, rated at about 44 horsepower and 43 lb-ft of torque. Output is sent to the rear wheels via a 3-speed automatic transmission.

item.title: 2019 Jaguar XF Sportbrake S
item.description: THIS... is a 2019 Jaguar XF Sportbrake S, finished in Fuji White with an Ebony interior. - The attached Carfax vehicle history report lists no mileage discrepancies in this Jaguar's past. - According to the build sheet provided in the gallery, this XF Sportbrake is an S model, and notable factory equipment includes the Driver Assistance, Comfort & Convenience, Technology, and Black Exterior packs. The selling dealer reports no notable modifications. - The XF Sportbrake S is a high-performance version of Jaguar's midsize luxury wagon. Introduced in 2018, it combines the practicality of a wagon with the luxury and driving fun expected from a Jaguar. Despite its combination of performance and utility, the XF Sportbrake was never a sales success stateside, with Jaguar confirming that it sold fewer than 250 units on the U.S. market over the model's production run. - Power comes from a 3.0-liter supercharged V6, rated at 380 horsepower and 332 lb-ft of torque. Output is sent to all four wheels via an 8-speed automatic transmission.

item.title: 1994 Toyota Land Cruiser
item.description: THIS… is a 1994 Toyota Land Cruiser, finished in Medium Red Pearl with a tan interior. - The attached Carfax vehicle history report contains a gap from 2013 to 2016, though it indicates no mileage discrepancies during the given time period. It also shows Southern ownership since new. - A partial list of notable equipment reported by the seller includes 16-inch wheels, triple locking differentials, a power sunroof, sliding rear quarter windows, and air conditioning. - Notable modifications reported by the seller include an Old Man Emu lift kit, an ARB steel front bumper, a front-mounted WARN winch, a 4X4LABS steel rear bumper with a swing-out tire carrier and ladder, and a JVC touchscreen head unit. - Released for 1991, the 80-Series is the first Land Cruiser to firmly plant its flag in the luxury segment. It was bigger than its predecessor, it gained a more aerodynamic design, and it offered better materials inside. It nonetheless kept what adventurers loved about the Land Cruiser: solid axles, a 2-speed transfer case, and a generous amount of ground clearance. Production ended after the 1997 model year. - Power comes from a 1FZ-FE 4.5-liter straight-6, rated at 212 horsepower and 275 lb-ft of torque. Output is sent to all four wheels via a 4-speed automatic transmission and a 2-speed transfer case.

item.title: 2014 BMW i3 EV
item.description: THIS... is a 2014 BMW i3 EV, finished in Capparis White with a Cassia interior. - The odometer on this i3 currently displays about 54,600 miles. - The attached Carfax vehicle history report indicates no accidents or mileage discrepancies in this BMW’s past. It also shows that this i3 has been registered in Florida since new. - According to the build sheet provided in the gallery, notable factory equipment includes Giga World trim, heated front seats, and a Harman/Kardon sound system. Notable modifications reported by the selling dealer are limited to a black-finished rear valance panel. - The i3 was BMW's first purpose-built electric car and was offered as a pure EV with or without a range-extender 2-cylinder gasoline engine. Introduced in the U.S. in 2014, the i3 boasts futuristic styling and a spacious B-pillarless design with rear-hinged rear doors. To minimize weight, the i3 also features a carbon fiber upper body structure and an aluminum undercarriage and battery housing. - Power comes from a single electric motor that draws electricity from a 22-kilowatt-hour lithium-ion battery pack to power the rear wheels with about 170 horsepower and 184 lb-ft of torque, according to third-party estimates. In 2014, the i3 EV received a maximum driving range rating of 81 miles from the EPA.

item.title: 2021 Toyota Tacoma Limited 4x4
item.description: THIS… is a 2021 Toyota Tacoma Limited 4x4, finished in Magnetic Gray Metallic with a Hickory interior. - The attached Carfax vehicle history report shows no accidents or mileage discrepancies in this Tacoma's past. It also shows that it's been registered to one owner since new. - According to the window sticker provided in the gallery, this is a Limited model, and notable factory equipment includes a power sunroof, a sliding rear window, a JBL sound system, and more as detailed below. - Notable modifications reported by the seller are extensive, and the full list is detailed below. Highlights include 20-inch Black Rhino Arsenal wheels, a 4 Wheel Parts rear reinforced bumper guard, and a Midland two-way radio. - Toyota launched the third-generation Tacoma for 2016 with an updated exterior design, a new 3.5-liter V6 engine available on some trim levels, and a more rigid frame. The brand also made suspension changes to give its smallest truck a smoother ride on the pavement without sacrificing off-road capacity, and it redesigned the interior with an eye on comfort. Tacoma buyers had numerous trim levels ranging from basic to upmarket to choose from. Production ended in 2023. - Power comes from a 3.5-liter V6 engine, rated at 278 horsepower and 265 lb-ft of torque. Output is sent to the rear or all four wheels via a 6-speed automatic transmission.

item.title: 2019 Mercedes-AMG GLS 63
item.description: THIS... is a 2019 Mercedes-AMG GLS 63, finished in Diamond White Metallic with an Espresso Brown and black interior. - The attached Carfax vehicle history report indicates no mileage discrepancies in this GLS 63’s past. - According to the build sheet provided in the gallery, notable factory equipment includes the AMG Night Package, 22-inch AMG wheels, a panoramic sunroof, heated and ventilated multicontour front seats, power-folding third-row seats, 3-zone automatic climate control, and Distronic Plus adaptive cruise control. The seller reports no notable modifications. - Mercedes-Benz released the second-generation GL for 2013. Marketed as the S-Class of the SUV world, it offered a long list of comfort and luxury features, powerful engines, and a spacious interior with three rows of seats. 2017 brought the GLS designation and a series of comprehensive updates, and production ended in 2019. The AMG-tuned GLS 63 was positioned at the very top of the X166 range. - Power comes from a 5.5-liter twin-turbocharged V8, rated at 577 horsepower and 561 lb-ft of torque. Output is sent to all four wheels via a 7-speed automatic transmission and Mercedes-AMG's 4Matic permanent all-wheel drive system.

item.title: 2017 Volkswagen GTI Sport
item.description: THIS... is a 2017 Volkswagen GTI Sport, finished in Deep Black Pearl with a Titan Black and Clark Plaid interior. - The attached Carfax vehicle history report shows no accidents or mileage discrepancies in this GTI’s past. It also shows that this Volkswagen has been registered to one owner since new. - According to the build sheet provided in the gallery, this GTI is a Sport model, and notable factory equipment includes a limited-slip front differential lock, Clark Plaid cloth upholstery, heated front sport seats, a 6.5-inch touchscreen infotainment system, and a rearview camera. - A full list of notable modifications reported by the seller is detailed below. Highlights include an APR Stage 1 ECU tune, an APR DSG TCU tune, H&R suspension springs, 034 Motorsports rear sway bar end links, 034 Motorsports dogbone mount, 18-inch Enkei wheels, a matte black vinyl wrap on the hood, black exterior badges, aftermarket mudflaps, aftermarket taillights, a JL Audio subwoofer, and Focal speakers. - The Mk7 Golf was introduced in 2012 on the automaker's new modular MQB platform, although U.S.-market sales didn't begin until the 2015 model year. Praised as the quintessential hot hatch, it was bigger in every direction than its predecessor, so it offered a more spacious cabin, yet it was also about 80 pounds lighter. - Power comes from a 2.0-liter turbocharged inline-4, rated at 220 horsepower and 258 lb-ft of torque. Due to the modifications performed to this Volkswagen, it may produce more power, but a dyno sheet was not provided to confirm. Output is sent to the front wheels via a 6-speed DSG automatic transmission.

item.title: 2006 BMW Z4 M Roadster
item.description: THIS... is a 2006 BMW Z4 M Roadster, finished in Imola Red with a black soft top and a black interior. - This BMW features a 6-speed manual transmission, and the odometer shows approximately 54,500 miles. - The attached Carfax vehicle history report shows no accidents or mileage discrepancies in this BMW’s past. It also shows that this BMW has been registered mostly in South Carolina, Florida, and Georgia since new. - According to the build sheet provided in the gallery, notable factory equipment includes 18-inch Style 224M wheels, a limited-slip differential, a power-operated soft top, Nappa leather upholstery, and heated seats. - Notable modifications reported by the seller include a hydraulic soft top motor relocated to the trunk and a factory short shifter and knob. - The Z4 M Roadster was introduced for the 2006 model year as the high-performance variant of BMW’s first-generation Z4. It features the S54 inline-6 engine derived from the E46 M3 and is valued by enthusiasts for its engaging driving dynamics and manual-only transmission. The Z4 M Roadster represents a focused, driver-oriented sports car in BMW’s lineup, produced in limited numbers. - Power comes from a 3.2-liter inline-6, rated at 330 horsepower and 262 lb-ft of torque. Output is sent to the rear wheels via a 6-speed manual transmission.

item.title: 2016 Chevrolet Corvette Stingray Z51 Coupe
item.description: THIS… is a 2016 Chevrolet Corvette Stingray Z51 Coupe, finished in black with a Jet Black interior. - This Corvette is equipped with the desirable 7-speed manual transmission. - The attached Carfax vehicle history report shows no mileage discrepancies in this Corvette’s past. - A partial list of notable equipment reported by the seller includes the Z51 Performance package, a removable roof panel, leather upholstery, and a Bose sound system. Notable modifications reported by the seller are limited to Borla Atak mufflers. - Chevrolet launched the seventh-generation Corvette (colloquially called C7) for the 2014 model year. It offered a more user-friendly interior, a sharper-looking exterior design, and, significantly, the then-new LT1 small-block V8. The C7 represented the culmination of four decades of development of the front-engine, rear-wheel drive Corvette, and production ended in 2019 with the introduction of the mid-engined C8. - Power comes from a 6.2-liter V8, rated at 460 horsepower and 465 lb-ft of torque. Output is sent to the rear wheels via a 7-speed manual transmission.

item.title: 2015 Volkswagen Touareg TDI Lux
item.description: THIS... is a 2015 Volkswagen Touareg TDI Lux, finished in Light Silver Metallic with a black interior. - The attached Carfax vehicle history report indicates no accidents or mileage discrepancies in this Touareg’s past. It also shows that this Volkswagen has been registered to one owner since new. - According to the build sheet provided in the gallery, this Touareg is a Lux model, and notable factory equipment includes 19-inch wheels, a panoramic sunroof, and heated front seats. The selling dealer reports no notable modifications. - The 2nd-generation Touareg debuted in 2010 and shared a platform with the Porsche Cayenne of the same era. Known as the 7P internally, it managed to weigh approximately 450 lbs less than its predecessor while packing in more modern technology and safety features and maintaining a reputation for understated comfort and luxury. The 7P Touareg was discontinued in 2018 with the introduction of the Atlas in North America and the 3rd-generation Touareg in Europe. - Power comes from a 3.0-liter turbodiesel V6, rated at 240 horsepower and 406 lb-ft of torque. Output is sent to all four wheels through an 8-speed automatic transmission and Volkswagen's 4Motion permanent all-wheel drive system.

item.title: 2025 BMW M5
item.description: THIS... is a 2025 BMW M5, finished in Daytona Violet Metallic with a Silverstone and black interior. - The attached Carfax vehicle history report shows no accidents or mileage discrepancies in this M5’s past. - According to the window sticker provided in the gallery, notable factory equipment includes Executive, Carbon, and M Driver's packages, Driving Assistance Professional, 20-inch front and 21-inch rear Style 951M Dark Grey wheels, M Carbon Ceramic Brakes, and carbon fiber high gloss silver thread interior trim. The seller reports no notable modifications. - The G90 is the seventh generation of M5, and it returns in 2025 with a new plug-in hybrid powertrain, combining exhilarating performance with a striking new look. For buyers who need a little more space, the M5 is also offered as a wagon, a first for the U.S. market. - Power comes from a gasoline-electric plug-in hybrid powertrain, which consists of a 4.4-liter twin-turbocharged V8, an electric motor, and a 14.8-kWh lithium-ion battery. The system is rated at a combined 717 horsepower and 738 lb-ft of torque. Output is sent to all four wheels via an 8-speed automatic transmission.

item.title: 2006 Volkswagen Phaeton
item.description: THIS... is a 2006 Volkswagen Phaeton, finished in Black Klavierlack with a Sunny Beige interior. - The attached Carfax vehicle history report shows no accidents or mileage discrepancies in this Phaeton’s past. - According to the Volkswagen Classic Parts certificate provided in the gallery, notable factory equipment includes a self-leveling air suspension system, heated and power-adjustable front and rear seats with massage, a heated steering wheel, and 4-zone climate control. Notable modifications reported by the seller are limited to a Bluetooth radio adapter. - Launched in America as a 2004 model, the Phaeton embodied the upmarket shift masterminded by former Volkswagen Group chairman Ferdinand Piëch. It was built on the same basic platform as the Bentley Continental Flying Spur, and it was unabashedly positioned as the flagship of the Volkswagen brand. Although it was an excellent sedan by most period accounts, it failed to excite consumers in the United States and sales ended after the 2006 model year. Most sources peg American sales in the vicinity of 3,000 units. - Power comes from a 4.2-liter V8, rated at 335 horsepower and 317 lb-ft of torque. Output is sent to all four wheels via a 6-speed automatic transmission and Volkswagen's 4Motion permanent all-wheel drive system.

item.title: 2013 Porsche Cayenne
item.description: THIS... is a 2013 Porsche Cayenne, finished in white with an Espresso interior. - The odometer on this Porsche currently displays approximately 50,300 miles. - The attached Carfax vehicle history report indicates no accidents or mileage discrepancies in this Porsche’s past. It also shows mostly Southern ownership since new. - According to the build sheet provided in the gallery, notable factory equipment includes the Premium Package Plus, Porsche Active Suspension Management (PASM), 20-inch Sport Design II wheels, Porsche Entry & Drive, and a Bose sound system. The selling dealer reports no notable modifications. - The second-generation Porsche Cayenne was introduced for the 2011 model year as a significant evolution of Porsche’s first SUV. It offered more refined styling, a wider range of options, and improved driving dynamics compared to its predecessor. The Cayenne has played a major role in Porsche’s model lineup, helping to broaden the brand’s appeal and financial success. - Power comes from a 3.6-liter V6, rated at 300 horsepower and 295 lb-ft of torque. Output is sent to all four wheels via an 8-speed automatic transmission.
